headline: ICE 😤🔫 MISSES TARGET 🎯💀: Lorenzo Slayed in White Van Van 🚐💥
text: ICE 🧊😡 agents chasing the wrong dude 🎯❌ spotted a white van 🚐👀 that kinda looked like their guy and BAM 💥 Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, 52-year-old Mexican builder 🛠️🇲🇽 with 30 YEARS of Houston hustle 💪 was driving to work 🕖 with three co-workers 🚗👷 when the stop went sideways 😵‍💫. DHS 📜 said no body cams 🎥🚫 on these agents yet, half got 'em now the rest in 60 days ⏳📅. Salgado had zero criminal record 🧾❌ and was close to getting that work permit 📋✨ but instead got the self-defense pop 🔫🛡️ after allegedly ramming an ICE whip 🚓💨. Family says he was just a hardworking undocumented OG 🧓🛠️ heading to the job site when the wrong white van 🚐👥 triggered the op. Protests erupted in Houston 🔥🌆 while four Dem congress reps 📢👩‍⚖️ demanded an independent probe 🕵️‍♂️🔍 and shouted out past victims like Renee Good and Alex Pretti 💔😢. Mexico 🇲🇽 Foreign Minister Roberto Velasco is filing CRIMINAL COMPLAINTS over 14 Mexican deaths in ICE custody 🗣️⚖️ plus three more during arrest ops, with Prez Claudia Sheinbaum backing the move 👑💪. DHS claims they surveilled two vans weeks earlier 🕵️‍♂️📅 but Lorenzo was just collateral in the wrong place wrong time 🚫⏰. The community is rallying 🌍🤝 while Mexico pushes for accountability and answers 🗣️❓ instead of the same old self-defense script 📜😒. No footage dropped yet 📹🚫 but the outrage is loud and clear 📢🔥. ICE tried to pop the wrong target but hit a 30-year builder legend 🏗️💔, and now the whole border drama is going full court press 🏛️⚖️ with puns flying and the pressure on ICE mounting like a stack of unpaid parking tickets 🚔💸!
